title: FrenToken Campaign
subtitle: Optimizing B2B Web3 Payment Marketing
overview: A cohesive, 4-part social media campaign designed for FrenToken to target business owners and developers at the start of the work week. The graphics translate complex Web3 infrastructure into digestible, high-converting B2B value propositions.
problem: Web3 and crypto payment solutions often suffer from marketing that is either overly technical or visually cluttered with chaotic 'cyberpunk' tropes. The challenge was to position FrenToken as a premium, trustworthy SaaS platform rather than just another volatile crypto token.
solution: Move away from cluttered crypto tropes to position FrenToken as a premium, trustworthy SaaS platform. A strict component framework was established with top-aligned branding, mid-tier custom 3D art, and bottom-anchored CTA waves to keep the campaign visually cohesive while swapping out marketing angles seamlessly.

features.title: Color Strategy & Brand Unity
features.description: Monochromatic Block: Using a premium purple-centric palette establishes immediate brand recognition in busy feeds. Functional Gradient: A crisp light-to-dark purple gradient keeps the text highly readable while grounding the composition.

features.title: Typography & Grid Structure
features.description: Dynamic Contrast: Paired a bold, tight-tracked geometric sans-serif for high-impact headers with an elegant, lighter italicized body font for scannability. The 'Infrastructure' Grid: Faint background grid lines subtly reinforce the concept of 'building' and 'data stability' without creating visual noise.

features.title: Layout Architecture
features.description: Organic Anchors: Asymmetrical dark waves at the bottom break up the rigid grid layout and naturally funnel the user's eye down. High-Contrast CTAs: Placing isolated white pill buttons directly onto the darkest part of the design creates an instant, high-converting focal point.

results.description: Targeted at business owners and developers
Top branding, mid-tier 3D art, bottom wave CTAs

sections.title: Asset Breakdown
sections.content:
- 01. Scalability: Features solid 3D purple coins emerging from the horizon. Design Intent: Visualizes safety, depth, and strong multi-chain foundations.
- 02. ROI/Pricing: Uses a transparent glass bar chart with rising arrows. Design Intent: Simplifies 'pay-as-you-go' scaling through an easily understood corporate growth metaphor.
- 03. Efficiency: Shows currency icons dropping smoothly into a digital wallet. Design Intent: Represents automated workflows and effortless revenue collection.
- 04. Cost Savings: Positions a metallic paper airplane carrying floating tokens. Design Intent: Conveys lightness, speed, and shedding unnecessary monthly subscription weight.

sections.title: The Takeaway
sections.content: By establishing a strict component framework (top-aligned branding, mid-tier custom 3D art, bottom-anchored CTA waves), the campaign remains visually cohesive while swapping out marketing angles seamlessly.
